mapper.select: /* selectEmailAuthInfo */ SELECT eml_cert_oid, cert_cd, expire_dt FROM ${schema}.eml_cert WHERE eml_lcal = #{emlLcal} AND eml_dmn = #{emlDmn} AND cert_stts_cd = 'PENDING' ORDER BY expire_dt DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.eml_subs ( user_nm, mpno_pfx, mpno_mid, mpno_sfx, eml_lcal, eml_dmn, inst_nm, jbps_nm, prvc_pvsn_agre_yn, apply_dt ) VALUES ( #{userNm}, #{mpnoPfx}, #{mpnoMid}, #{mpnoSfx}, #{emlLcal}, #{emlDmn}, #{instNm}, #{jbpsNm}, #{prvcPvsnAgreYn}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.eml_subs SET user_nm = #{newUserNm}, eml_lcal = #{delToken}, eml_dmn = #{delToken}, inst_nm = #{delToken}, jbps_nm = #{delToken}, mpno_pfx = #{delToken}, mpno_mid = #{delToken}, mpno_sfx = #{delToken}, sub_stat_cd = #{subStatCd}, cncltn_dt = CURRENT_DATE WHERE user_nm = #{userNm} AND eml_lcal = #{emlLcal} AND sub_stat_cd = 'SUB'
mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('del', LPAD( COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(mpno_pfx, 4) AS UNSIGNED)) + 1 FROM ${schema}.eml_subs WHERE mpno_pfx LIKE 'del%' -- mpno_pfx에서 del% 패턴 찾기 AND mpno_pfx REGEXP '^del[0-9]+$' -- 숫자 패턴 체크 ), 1 ), 8, '0'))
mapper.insert: /* insertExpiredEmailAuthLogs */ INSERT INTO ${schema}.eml_cert_log ( eml_lcal, eml_dmn, eml_cert_stts_cd, reg_id, reg_dt ) SELECT eml_lcal, eml_dmn, 'EXPIRED', 'SYSTEM', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM ${schema}.eml_cert WHERE expire_dt < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND cert_stts_cd = 'PENDING'
mapper.delete: /* deleteExpiredEmailAuth */ DELETE FROM ${schema}.eml_cert WHERE expire_dt < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
